specification: For every TagElement, for each fragment that is a TextElement, there must be at least one TextElement instance in the system having the same text.

For every instance of TextElement, there should exist a TagElement where, in its fragments, there exists at least one TextElement with the same text content as the aforementioned TextElement instance.
For every instance of SingleVariableAccess, there must be at least one VariableDeclaration such that the declared variable is the same as the variable in the SingleVariableAccess instance.

ocl: context Modifier inv: (self.bodyDeclaration <> null implies BodyDeclaration.allInstances()->exists(bd | bd = self.bodyDeclaration)) and (self.singleVariableDeclaration <> null implies SingleVariableDeclaration.allInstances()->exists(svd | svd = self.singleVariableDeclaration)) and (self.variableDeclarationStatement <> null implies VariableDeclarationStatement.allInstances()->exists(vds | vds = self.variableDeclarationStatement)) and (self.variableDeclarationExpression <> null implies VariableDeclarationExpression.allInstances()->exists(vde | vde = self.variableDeclarationExpression))
specification: For a Modifier, if its 'bodyDeclaration' is not null, then there must exist at least one BodyDeclaration instance that matches its 'bodyDeclaration'. Similarly, if its 'singleVariableDeclaration' is not null, then there must exist at least one SingleVariableDeclaration instance that matches its 'singleVariableDeclaration'. There must exist at least one instance of 'Type' such that the name of the type of the current object is equal to the name of that instance.

ocl: context MethodInvocation inv: MethodDeclaration.allInstances()->exists(md|md = self.method) and self.arguments->forAll(arg|arg.oclIsTypeOf(SingleVariableAccess) implies SingleVariableAccess.allInstances()->exists(sva | sva = arg))
specification: For every instance of MethodInvocation, there must exist a corresponding instance of MethodDeclaration such that the method in MethodDeclaration is the one invoked in MethodInvocation. Additionally, every argument in the MethodInvocation, if it is of type SingleVariableAccess, must correspond to an existing instance of SingleVariableAccess.
For every instance named 'ExpressionStatement', there must exist at least one instance of 'Expression' such that the instance can be equal to the expression of the 'ExpressionStatement'.
